title: Fix a potential deadlock during `podman cp`
body:
Have one function without a `defer lock.unlock()` as one of the commands in it calls a function that also takes the same lock, so the unlock has to happen prior to function completion. Unfortunately, this is prone to errors, like the one here: I missed a case, and we could return without unlocking, causing a deadlock later in the cleanup code as we tried to take the same lock again.

Fix is simple enough - add the missing unlock.

Fixes #25585

```release-note
Fixed a bug where the `podman cp` command could deadlock when copying into a non-empty volume on a container that is not running ([#25585](https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/25585)).
```

comments.body: Also it would likely be good to point to e66b788 in the commit message so if anyone ever things about backporting that they hopefully also remember to get this fix here.
